requestBody: {"TABLE":"application","DATABASE":"flow_metrics","DATA_SOURCE":"1m","QUERIES":[{"QUERY_ID":"R1","ROLES":["R"],"SELECT":"newTag('R1') as query_id, PerSecond(Avg(`request`)) AS `请求速率`, Avg(`server_error_ratio`) AS `服务端异常比例`, Avg(`rrt`) AS `响应时延`, node_type(auto_service) AS `node_type`, icon_id(auto_service) AS `icon_id`, auto_service_id, auto_service, Enum(role), role","TAGS":["node_type(auto_service) AS `node_type`","icon_id(auto_service) AS `icon_id`","auto_service_id","auto_service","Enum(role)","role"],"METRICS":["PerSecond(Avg(`request`)) AS `请求速率`","Avg(`server_error_ratio`) AS `服务端异常比例`","Avg(`rrt`) AS `响应时延`"],"GROUP_BY":"auto_service, role, auto_service_id, `node_type`"}],"PAGE_INDEX":1,"PAGE_SIZE":100,"SORT":{"ORDER_BY":"请求速率","SORTED_BY":"DESC"},"time_start":1784626737,"time_end":1784627637,"IS_RETURN_APPLICATION_TYPE":true,"TOTAL":true}
